title: Production Agent Loop and Goal Capstone · State Workshop
summary: Build a safe goal-driven agent for a realistic repository or operations task. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a production-ready agent-loop reference implementation while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose workflow or agent patterns and justify complexity from task uncertainty.
Connect persistent goals, adaptive plans, tool state, and terminal conditions.
Integrate permissions, idempotency, stop controls, and fault recovery.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Bounded agent-loop portfolio. No external effects occur in this browser lab."""
